positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring intricate bioluminescent celestial flora and geometric space mandalas. The design should have a clear Art Nouveau etching style with strong, thick outlines, giving it a silkscreen print aesthetic. The central subject is a blooming, stylized cosmic orchid intertwined with constellations and stylized waves. Use a highly contrasting color palette of midnight blue, emerald green, and metallic gold accents. Perfect for textile printing on apparel, minimalist composition, high detail, strong silhouette, central focus.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, jpeg artifacts, grainy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, cropped, noisy, signature
